name: statecharts-harness
description: Executable simulation oracle for schema-therapy artifact 05 (specs/05-statecharts/<entity>.scxml). Pins @scion-scxml/core + @scion-scxml/scxml (the format's own IRP reference SCXML interpreter — the execution oracle) and @dbml/core (to enumerate the 04 status enums + lifecycle entities) per references/simulation.md §1.
